positive: A symmetrical and highly intricate illustration of celestial flora and geometric cosmic vines. The central composition is structured like a futuristic mandala, featuring bioluminescent, glowing flowers, swirling nebulae patterns, and interwoven golden geometric mandalas. The color palette must use deep midnight blue, vibrant cyan, electric magenta, and glowing gold accents. The style should be a hyper-detailed blend of Art Deco elegance and sci-fi vector illustration, ensuring strong silhouettes, high contrast, and optimal clean lines for commercial apparel printing. Zero gradient transitions, crisp lines, perfect symmetry.
